title: Tidyz All-in-One Handy Bags 40 Pack (Pack of 2) – Multi-Purpose Carrier & Pedal Bin Bags, Strong & Durable, Leak Resistant Household Waste Bags
features: Multipurpose Handy Bags for Everyday Use: Ideal for use as carrier bags, pedal bin liners, and general household waste disposal.
Strong & Durable Material: Made from reliable material to handle everyday waste without tearing or splitting.
Leak Resistant Design: Helps contain liquids and prevent spills, ensuring clean and hygienic waste management.
Convenient Pack of 2 (80 Bags Total): Value pack provides long-lasting supply for home, office, or on-the-go use.
Compact & Easy to Store: Lightweight and space-saving design makes them easy to store and access when needed.
description: Tidyz All-in-One Handy Bags 40’s (Pack of 2) offer a practical and versatile solution for everyday household needs. Designed for use as carrier bags, pedal bin liners, or general waste disposal, these bags are made from durable material to ensure reliable performance. Their leak-resistant design helps maintain cleanliness and hygiene, while the compact size makes them perfect for smaller bins or quick disposal tasks. With a total of 80 bags, this value pack is ideal for home, office, or travel use, providing convenience and efficiency in managing everyday waste.
